HGSS.706.0001:
You...
You think I’m cool right?\f
So how about we exchange phone
numbers? [0200,0000]
HGSS.706.0002: Don’t worry, you can call me anytime!
HGSS.706.0003:
Oh, I see...
Maybe I was overthinking things...
HGSS.706.0004:
I knew it! I knew you’d think I
was cool!\f
So, shall we trade phone
numbers now? [0200,0000]
HGSS.706.0005:
You must be really shy.
If you’re nearby, you can come talk to\r
me in person. It’s all right.
HGSS.706.0006:
My prized [0100,000A,0000] is doing great.\f
Which Pokémon do you like best?
You should show me sometime.
HGSS.706.0007:
Hey, listen up!
Yesterday we were fighting a wild\r
[0100,000B,0000].\f
I thoughtlessly used a Potion at the
wrong moment, and it looked like we were\r
going to lose.\f
My Pokémon worked so hard. I really
wanted to win, you know?\f
Well, those kinds of things happen,
I guess.
HGSS.706.0008:
Do you keep all the Pokémon you
capture in PC Boxes?\f
Me, I usually just let them go...\f
That reminds me, I recently let this
[0100,000B,0000] go...\f
That’s kind of a waste, isn’t it?
HGSS.706.0009:
Hey, what do you think about battling
with me again?\f
I’m at the [0104,0003,0000]
right now.\f
Come on over!
HGSS.706.0010:
Hello?
Do you remember your promise?\f
We have to battle soon!
I’ll be at the [0104,0003,0000].
HGSS.706.0011:
It wasn’t a very smart move to come to
the Park in a miniskirt, was it...?\f
I mean, these leaves keep scratching
my legs...
